Still feeling sick today and sneezing alot with a runny nose but otherwise I ' m feeling pretty good . I have work in a couple hours at the restaurant and it ' s Friday night so I ' m sure I ' ll be busy making a ton of drinks .

I ' m still feeling kinda sickly but I powered through at work last night . It ' s was so crazy busy that I could barely keep up . I love when that happens haha . I ended out the night very sore but over 300 dollars richer so I can ' t complain

I ' m feeling so much better today ! Seems like this cold is almost gone thank god . Last night was busy at the bar and I did pretty decent . I ' m pretty exhausted today but it ' s my last day to work and then I ' m off for three days

I have been feeling somewhat down . I am trying to be more productive and get things done . I am having trouble finding the energy and motivation . I can ' t type any more characters . I ' m pretty sure this is over 200 .

The last day has been much better than yesterday . Friends surprised with visit and we had a late night get together . My schedule at work changed to a more consistent schedule . What a relief ! This 200 character minimum is very frustrating .

I feel pretty good , a little tired . I didn’t get home until midnight and right back at it this morning .   Ready to get my shift over for the day . I have two shifts left and I have the next two days off . I’m anxious , but ready .

I hate my job . I hate people at times . I just wanna go home . I don’t understand hope they Think we can manage without a break , all day long . Especially me being 46   years old   I just need a new job . A new profession . I can’t do this right now .

I feel okay today , but of course I’m off today . I wanted a drink last night , to be honest , but I never drank one . Yesterday was a long , bad day . I just went to bed instead , and got a good nights rest . I feel so much better today

I feel a lot better today . I got a good nights rest last night . After a super long , terrible day . Of course I’m off today . So that helps . A lot . Sometimes I like my job , but sometimes not . But I love my days off .

I’m okay today . Today is my day off . I’m not looking forward to tomorrow , with the exception that they owe me money , and I can get that . I work a double tomorrow and I’m not looking forward to dealing with the people .

I feel kind of down . Money has a lot to do with it . I need money so bad , and I feel like I’m not making any lately to account to anything . I feel under paid and under appreciated . I’m not looking forward to work tomorrow . I work a double . Yaaay

I am tired . I don’t feel good this evening . I worked this morning . It wasn’t that bad , but I did leave for the evening instead of working my double . I just wasn’t feeling well , my legs and my back were hurting really Bad . Overall , my shift was good though . Just tired . And hurting .

I feel okay right now . Of course my shift is fixing to start , so we will see in a few hours how I’m feeling . Hopefully the shift and the people won’t be that bad . I’m pretty happy/content at the moment and feeling okay today .

Today hasn’t been so bad . I didn’t really make a lot , which sucks , but it is what it is . I’m in a pretty good mood and feel pretty good . Today has been okay . My people were all pretty nice . Just wish there was more money .

I feel good . I’m off this evening . I’ve been off the last two days , besides working this morning , and then this evening off . That does good for my mentality , and with dealing with the public . Sometimes it’s hard to do , deal with people . Then others , they can be really sweet and nice . But overall I feel good right now .

I’m hungry and broke . Studying for college at the moment . But I’m content , besides being hungry . I have to work later , which bums me out , but I need the money .   I’m a pretty positive person though , things will look up .

I’m very tired . Don’t feel good at all . I do not want to go to work . I would rather sit home . I just do not feel good today . I felt a lot better earlier . Worried about bills . Money . I need money Bad .

I’m at work . Things are going pretty good I guess . I thought it was going to be slow , but it picked up some , so that is good . I’m broke , I need the money , and that stresses me out , bad . Other than that , my mind is clear at the moment . Although I am worried about a couple things , they aren’t bothering me at the moment . Probably because I’m at work .

So this morning I had school . Biology so far . That Shìt messed with my mind ! I’m not good with science . Other than that , I am good today . I feel okay and have a pretty good outlook so far today . Work tonight after school , not looking forward to that with the exception of I need money .

I feel okay besides hurting . My mental clarity is good right now . I’m not happy or sad , just content I guess . I still don’t want to work tonight but I know I need the money . I’m going to school so if I can get through this , I’ll be good .

I’m done with work and   mode a little money , so I’m happy about that . I do not need to drink to feel happy or not be   stressed   out . I’m off tomorrow and that also makes me happy . I’m pretty good tonight . Content .

I just got up not long ago , no school or work today . I’m off , just need to go work on my school work . So I’m clam , and comment right now . Hurting   a little , but I’m okay . I get to go get my grandson later , he’s2 , so that makes me happy to that I get to spend some time with him . Have a great day !

My grandson has stayed with me tonight . He’s two and not listening and my head hurts . I’m also trying to study biology . I can say the three do not go together . I just wish my head would quit hurting , and my legs . It’s my night off !! Can I not get a break from life once in a while ?? Why does life have to be so damned hard at times ??

I’m trying to do homework , I have a Paper due this Somali that I’m working on . It’s going well , so far . So that helps with my sanity . lol . I’m okay , as far as right now . I have to work tonight , not looking forward to that with the exception that I need money , so I’ll make it through it . Maybe not happy , until I get off , but I’ll get more money for my bills and such . That does a lot for my mental stability .

I don’t feel good . Mentally and physically . I’m hurting bad and tired as hell . Still got to work . Still got to have that money to pay my bills . I was I was rich sometimes , not all   the time . Sometimes I’m content , sometimes , it would just be easier to gave money . Thinks will look up

My head hurts . That makes everything bad . I didn’t have to work tonight , they sent me home as extra . I needed to stay and work , I needed the money . But at the same time , I was happy to go cause I don’t feel good at all . I’m not sick , just getting old sucks .

I feel pretty good this morning and I’m at work . We will see how things go today . On how I feel later , and tonight . I have to work a double , so tonight too . But then I’m off for two days , so hopefully they show me to stay for both shifts , cause I need the money . Overall , I’m content and calm right now .

I still feel okay right now . Hopefully I continue to through work tonight . I have a lot on my mind right now . Stuff going on with my house , they see trying to take it because I was late through COVID . I owe nothing , but she still wants it back . I’m up to date with my payment . I don’t get it and that messes with my head , I’d like to know why !!!

I’m At work . It’s busy . Making a little cash , so that’s a good thing . I’m feeling okay tonight . Just worried about my house really . And money . It’s been slack here lately . But January is always bad . It’ll get better though . Won’t always be bad

I don’t feel that bad , yet . I get so tired of not feeling good . Getting old sucks ass !! I’m trying to work on school work , not really getting anywhere but I have a couple of things due today , and something due by the first that I need to work on today . I have school first thing in the morning , so I can not do it then . I’ll just have to trudge away at it today .

I’m trying to study . My legs are hurting , but I’m trying to move past that thought . I just need to accept that I’m going to hurt and most days I don’t feel good , I guess . If it isn’t one thing , it’s another ! A headache , or I’m tired , or my legs hurt , it’s always something ! Other than that , mentally I’m okay . I’m off today and my boyfriend is home too .

I don’t feel good , again . I get so tired of this Shìt ! My legs are hurting so bad ! They have since I was little though and I’m46 , you think I would be used to it by now . But I’m not . I get so tired of feeling bad . I’m miserable . I just hate to feel like this .

I’m in school . I’m On break at the moment . 5 minutes . lol . Anyway , I feel okay right now . Just need to study this biology , because most of it I do not get . That makes me nervous about passing the class !!! But I’m trying . Hopefully I feel okay today . No work , so there’s that . Still worried about my home . That won’t stop until I know what’s going on .

My head hurts and I’m trying to study . Not working too well . I guess I couldn’t have felt good all day ? Is that too much to ask ? That I feel okay every now and again ? Life sucks sometimes ! I wish I were rich and felt good . Then things would not be so hard .

I just got off work . I actually feel okay for once . And I went to school today too . I’m surprised . Still worried about my house . But this too shall pass , right ? I’m content tonight . For the first time in days .

I’m good right now . I feel content . Calm . Just trying to get some school work done . Studying biology . Fun fun ! But I feel okay today . I’m off today as well , so no work . But I’ma double tomorrow , so I have a lot of school work to get done today . Talk to you more soon !

I do not feel well . I keep feeling dizzy . If it wasn’t for that I would feel fine . Like I said before , it is always something ! I’m trying to do school work and it is hard to do when you feel dizzy , but I have so much I need to work on right now . I will get it done somehow .

I’m okay . Just got done eating . I feel better this evening than I did earlier this afternoon . I’m tired , but I feel okay . I’m content . I’m good right now . Not long before I’m going to bed . I have to work a double tomorrow . Yay me !! I’ve got so much school work , I need to work on it instead , but I got to get that money too for my bills .

I’m at work . I am feeling okay so far today , but I am a double , so we will see what happens . Hopefully I will continue to feel well and stay content with how things are . I wish I knew what was going to happen with my home , that would take a load off of me ! I would be in such a better mind set of that was just over with ! I do not like not knowing what will happen . Hopefully it will all turn out ok and I am worrying for nothing .

I’m at work . I feel ok , but I am pissed . I am a double and they will not cut me . For god sake’s , I’ve got to come back ! Why are they keeping me here !? I have an empty section . This is PERSON  . Other than that , I’m ok still

I feel dizzy again , and that makes me not feel well . If that wasn’t the case , besides being extremely tired , I would be fine . I got sent home from work as an extra , I needed to stay and work , I needed the money . Hopefully I will work tomorrow night , and feel good tomorrow .

I feel ok . I’m trying to get some homework done before work at 3 : 45 . I have some assignments due tomorrow by midnight . I don’t feel bad , but I don’t feel great either . I’m just okay . I’m not anxious , I’m calm . Just trying to work on some stuff . I’ll get it done . I always do .

I am currently okay . I do not feel bad , but I do not feel good . If that makes sense . I’ll take it , beats feeling bad all the time ! I have to work in about 45 minutes , not looking forward to that . But I’ll get through it .

I’m at work . I’m feeling okay tonight/today . Thankfully . I hate feeling bad , and I feel bad so much . It gets so tiring ! I’m still worried about my house , but that’ll pass too . Hopefully sooner than later . Other than that , I am good today .

I’m feeling okay today , so far . I have some school work to do , but do not really feel like doing it today . But I’ll end up working on it at some point . I have not been up long , so we will see how I feel later . But right now I’m good .

I am doing homework . Biology . Yuck . Anyway , I still feel okay . I’m off today and tomorrow , but I have school tomorrow . At 8 : 00 am . So no work until Tuesday night . That’s good . I get so tired of working , busting   my ass for money that just disappears . But you have to have it ! Life sucks at times . lol . I really am okay right now .

I’m tired . I’ve been sitting at my computer all day doing school work . I’m ready for bed , but I still haven’t done everything I needed to get done before tomorrow . Oh well . Not much I can do . So I’m a little stressed about that .

I’m okay today . I feel okay so far . Test next week in biology , not looking forward to that . Nervous about that . That stresses me because I’m not that good with science , and math . Hopefully I continue to feel ok today . Feeling bad sucks .

Feeling okay today . I’m ready to go home . Got more school work to do . I’m off tonight , so that is a good thing . I am already tired , so at least I know I can go to bed early if I need to . I’m content and calm today

I am working in school work , really tired tonight . I still have a lot to do . I feel okay , I am just tired . Tired of thinking about my home , what they going to do . I wish they would go ahead and do what they going to , because I am tired of worrying about it .

I’m feeling okay today , so far anyway . School work right now . I work at 4 : 45 . I need the money , or I would not go . I would just concentrate on my school work . I wish I could do that . That would be so much simpler . Hopefully I continue to feel okay , through tonight , through work .

I’m feeling okay , and a little accomplished I guess . Been working diligently on school work and that makes me feels good to get it done , and to get a good grade . Bad grades   stress me . But I funny have any bad ones yet . I have to get ready for work , that’s what I’m doing now . So yeah , with tonight . Hopefully I feel okay through that .

I feel okay . Just got off of work , going home . I have class at 8 am . I have felt pretty good today , thankfully . I hate so much to feel bad . But today has been a good day . I am still worried about my home though , we’ll be until I know what’s going on

I’m okay , I’m good . I’ve been doing homework all day , no work . Just a little stressed about bills is all . I have several things I need to post in the next couple weeks . That worries me because they are already behind . Other than that , I am okay .

I feel good this morning . I’ve been working on school work again . That keeps me from being bored , cause when I’m in school , I have plenty to do . I am still stressed about money , but it usually works itself out . So I am hoping it well this time as well .

I am feeling good . Just got to work , and I are when I got here . That’s always a help because it makes me nauseous when I’m super hungry . Hopefully tonight goes well and I make good money . I sure need it . Have a good evening !!

Awake , aware and up early .   Having breakfast and going shopping .   No hangover at all .   I typically get up early every morning no matter what .   Drinking water all night helps with an issues from drinking

Spending the night at work a d not drinking .   I’m serving plenty customers alcohol and having fun with them . I don’t know what else to say to fill my quota of words .

Woke up early than usual-6am ! It was a nice day out , so I went to FAC  and walked around .   Felt good about myself . No hangover and no headache .   I felt I had alot of energy to do alot of things in GPE  .

I ' m feeling great .   Went to work and socialized with co-workers . My boss even recognized my spirited personality today . Didn ' t even feel depressed or drained from work .   I felt emotionally stable .   I hope to feel this way tomorrow .

I woke up feeling great ! I had a productive day workout , hanging with friends and family . I’m looking forward to a better tomorrow . My son I my motivation I will do anything for him . I thank God for loving me everyday

over the weekend , my friends dad and dog both died so i have been feeling sorry for him and helping him book travel to GPE to be with his family . It’s pretty much all i have spent time or energy on .

i am still feeling the same as i was yesterday ; sad for my friend . i had a nice meal last night and was able to spend some time on myself yesterday which made me happy . i would like to be more productive on my days off .

i ran my fastest 5k ever yesterday ! i have been doing a running workout program for one week and am proud of myself for sticking to it . i usually lose interest/drive in workout programs pretty quickly but i have done the workouts every day so far

i did not have restful sleep last night . i had “server nightmares” and woke up in a panic this morning . i had a good night at work last night but i really did not want to be there for some reason ; despite working with my favorite people

I have been feeling very positive and happy . I haven’t been drinking today and I have been doing great in my school work and had a productive day . I am excited to have a positive day tomorrow ! I have plans to get stuff done before I go to work .

I had a great day yesterday . I got a lot of school work done and spent time with a very close friend which was great . I feel good today just pretty calm and have been resting before I head to work tonight .

I’ve been feeling good . It’s finals week so lots of studying but otherwise trying to enjoy the things in front of me . Should I drink less s ? Probably . Love this survey but 200 characters is a lot ... like 200 characters is actually so many !

Energized , ready for my last shift of the week . Grateful that I have 2 days in a row off and that I have a job that pays as well as it does . Hopefully tonight will be smooth and by the numbers , that the kitchen performs well and that the guests are easy going .

Slightly overwhelmed with responsibility and uncertainty around the future . Overall relatively confident in my ability to tackle those responsibilities and face those uncertainties with a few bouts of less confidence here and there .

Like there’s not enough time in the day to accomplish everything I need to do . Like something important is going to fall through the cracks . I should note that these feelings have little to nothing to do with my employment .

I’ve been feeling pretty peaceful and at ease . I’m in the middle of three days off from work and even though I have lots of other responsibilities at the moment they don’t feel terribly overwhelming and I feel confident in taking them on .

I have been feeling lighthearted and happy . I spent time with friends during one of my days off and got caught up on some chores and other life responsibilities . That’s about it . Here’s 200 characters .

I’m feeling excited about the work I’m starting out with . I’m meeting some new people and getting to know them and enjoying the anticipation of fun things to do . Here’s 200 characters to satisfy the character requirement .

Yesterday I was feeling overwhelmed and not confident . Today I’m feeling a little better . Still slightly overwhelmed and like there’s not enough time in the day , but less insecure about it right now . I can’t believe that wasn’t 200 characters but here you go .

I feel more energized than few hours ago but I still need to recoup from last night ' s overnight shift . I feel more balanced and less anxious . Having today ' s off is what I needed the most . Let ' s hope that the remaining of the day will help become more relaxed .
Accomplished , Proud , Happy , Content , At peace

I just woke up . I feel good , refreshed , well-rested and optimistic . As soon as I finish this survey , I will start my day and I know it will be a great one . I don ' t feel bothered or distraughted .   Good   and peaceful things will come my way today . I am so sure of that .

I will start my shift at work in 30 minutes . I feel relaxed and optimistic . I am sipping on my favorite non-alcoholic drink while waiting for my time to start . I need to be further relaxed . I feel good , not nervous at all .

I feel sluggish after waking up as I haven ' t slept well last night . Before that , work was not bad , but I felt unsatisfied and wondered why I was there . I thought I would ' ve conquered the day . Ultimately , it wasn ' t the case . I hope that today will be better .

I woke up a little bit lethargic but , as soon as I got ready to start my day , I felt better but not great . I just feel fine . I just hope that my day will be better and I will experience more exciting things through it .

I feel neutral . I am on lunch right now . I had a good shift so far . The customers , drivers and affiliates didn ' t bother at all and I was willing to help them . I feel good . I hope that the rest of my shift and overall day goes as smoothly as possible .

I feel a little jittery . Intrusive thoughts about my life and how myself on the next 15 years got me somewhat scared . I realize that I don ' t like as how my life is so far : my health , my job , my finances , my dating life (which is non-existent) , the city and country I currently live in . I know that this feeling is a call to change but there are too many options and I don ' t know where to start . I hope those thoughts dissipate as my day goes by .

I feel neutral . I am actually feeling better than the last few hours . Chitchatting with my colleagues made me feel better and less anxious . I feel more confident about the future . I hope that the remainder of my shift will go as smoothly as possible .

I just woke up and I am feeling refreshed and well-rested . I am optimistic about how my day will be . I feel calm , not stressed . I am bursting with enthusiasm . As soon as I am done with this survey , I will get ready and prepare for my day at work later on .

I am starting my shift in a few minutes . I feel satiated and prepared . I feel relaxed right now . I am just waiting patiently for my shift to start . I am thinking about what I will do my next day off . Probably , doing some house cleaning and go to the movies , or go to the park .

Quite " is an intensifier that means "really ," "completely ," "rather ," "exceptionally ," or "actually ". It ' s used to add strength to an adjective or adverb , but not as much as "really " or "very ". For example , "Blue jays are quite common in this area " means that blue jays are noticeably common , more common than you might expect . \n

Calm means free from agitation , excitement , or passion . Here are some ways to describe something as calm : 
 
Serene : A calm , peaceful , or tranquil state . When used to describe people , it can suggest dignity , composure , and graciousness . When used to describe nature , it can suggest mellowness .

Sadness is an emotion that can be described as a feeling of unhappiness , sorrow , or grief . It can also be characterized by feelings of loss , disappointment , helplessness , or despair . When someone is sad , they may withdraw from others , become lethargic or quiet , or cry

Feeling calm is a mental state of peace and quiet , free from agitation , excitement , or disturbance . It can also be described as a state of serenity , tranquility , or peace . When you feel calm , your body may experience the following physical changes : Lowered heart rate , Reduced blood pressure , Decreased feelings of anger and frustration \ n

Feeling alive is a state of being that involves experiencing the full range of human emotions , including hopes , fears , and losses . It can also mean being present in the moment , and being fully engaged in the things you do
Happy , Good , Hyped up , Stress free , Living good

Feeling neutral is a calm , measured emotion that can mean feeling indifferent , nothing in particular , or a lack of preference . It can also mean being impartial , unbiased , or disinterested . Some say that feeling neutral can help you : Detach from a situation , See things more clearly , Think more creatively , Make better decisions , and Move forward \ n
Slow , Sluggish , Dull , Not interested , Down
Sad , Feeling down , Depressed , At my lowest , Down

It ' s also normal to have an "off " day or two , and it can be a good opportunity to check in with yourself . If you ' re feeling "off " for more than a couple of days , you can try reflecting on what ' s going on and asking yourself some non-judgmental questions . \n

Sadness is a common emotion that can be characterized by a low mood or feeling down . It can be caused by a number of things , including : Disappointing events , Major life changes , Loss , Memories from childhood , and A painful situation that was blocked out . \n
